channel.title: Breaking-Changes on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Breaking-Changes on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Announcing etcd v3.7.0
item.description:
etcd v3.7.0 adds RangeStream for chunked range results, improves range/lease/watch performance, and completes the move off legacy v2store dependencies. It also includes protobuf dependency cleanup, Unix socket support, new metrics, and several upgrade-breaking removals.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: github: Upcoming breaking changes for npm v12
item.description:
npm v12 will change the default behavior of npm install with security-related defaults. The post says these changes are already available as warnings in npm 11.16.0 and newer.

  • Source: GitHub
